must_have_quals: 2+ years of experience in AI-related technology projects, Proficiency in machine learning techniques and algorithms, Strong programming skills in Python and experience with AI frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch, Experience with data analysis and visualization tools

job_summary: Honeywell is a leading software-industrial company that invents and commercializes technologies to address critical challenges. In this role, you will develop and implement AI algorithms and models to solve complex business problems while collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure the integration of AI solutions into existing systems and processes.
